_doc: DB Component Registry: Layer D canonical patterns (FULLSTACK_COMPONENT_LIBRARY_ROADMAP §1, opened 2026-07-17). For the Database layer a 'component' is a canonical PATTERN, not an importable module. Adoption is MEASURED by tools/db_adoption_census.py over the substrate's live-DB-derived chunks (substrate/table-rls/*.md = pg_policies+pg_trigger introspection; substrate/view/*.md = pg_get_viewdef + invoker flag), rebuilt by tools/build_substrate.py and freshness-gated by validate_substrate_freshness.py: so the census measures the REAL database, one derivation step removed. Floors in db_adoption_baseline.json are forward-only from any writer.

components.name: RLS enabled on tenant tables
components.api: ALTER TABLE … ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY

components.name: hive-membership scoping policy
components.api: USING/CHECK via the canonical helper-fn family: user_hive_ids() / user_supervisor_hive_ids() / auth_worker_names() (raw hive_members subqueries are the legacy spelling). Adoption = the substrate rules-engine's own 'Verdict: SCOPED'.
components.exempt_reason: D-P3 triage 2026-07-17 (all four are VALUE-INTEGRITY flags, not scoping holes): marketplace_listings = FIXED by canonical-sourcing (mig 20260713000009: displays read seller_verified/completed_sales/rating_avg from marketplace_sellers via the truth view; raw columns display-inert; marketplace scoping is seller-based by design). ai_reply_feedback + conversation_analytics = self-authored OPINION ratings by design (a user's own rating is not a trust column). platform_feedback = attribution NOW PINNED (mig 20260717000001 bind trigger, forge-verified live); its rating is a self-authored opinion; anon-submit is by design.

components.name: auth_uid ownership policy
components.when_to_use: own-row mutation guards on worker-authored rows
components.when_not: tables where supervisors legitimately mutate others' rows via a broader policy (documented)
components.exempt_reason: D-P3 triage 2026-07-17: all five are SERVICE-ROLE-WRITTEN (INSERT/UPDATE policies false or absent = client mutation impossible under RLS; community_xp is trigger-written). An ownership guard on a surface clients cannot write is moot: the stronger deny-all already holds.

components.name: security_invoker on views
components.satisfies: no owner-rights RLS bypass (cross-hive read-leak class, mig 001)

components.name: bind_* attribution triggers
components.api: CREATE TRIGGER bind_<table>_registrant … (server-binds forgeable registrant columns)
components.when_to_use: tables whose attribution columns a client could forge
